title: astragalus laspurensis
intro: Astragalus laspurensis, also known as Laspur Milk Vetch or Astragalus laspurensis, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus laspurensis are thought to include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. In terms of herbal preparations, Astragalus laspurensis is typically used in dried root or extract form, and can be taken as a supplement or used in teas and infusions.
